Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\)
from app.services.codegen.engine import generate
from app.models.pipeline import PipelineDAG, PipelineNode, PipelineEdge
from app.models.codegen import CodeGenFormat

dag = PipelineDAG\(
    id='test',
    name='Test Pipeline',
    pipeline='ml',
    nodes=[
        PipelineNode\(id='n1', definitionId='ml.ingest.csv', position={'x':0,'y':0}, config={'file_path':'data.csv'}\),
        PipelineNode\(id='n2', definitionId='ml.transform.missing_values', position={'x':200,'y':0}, config={'strategy':'drop_rows'}\),
        PipelineNode\(id='n3', definitionId='ml.transform.train_test_split', position={'x':400,'y':0}, config={'target_column':'label','test_size':0.2}\),
        PipelineNode\(id='n4', definitionId='ml.train.sklearn.random_forest', position={'x':600,'y':0}, config={'target_column':'label','n_estimators':100}\),
        PipelineNode\(id='n5', definitionId='ml.evaluate.classification', position={'x':800,'y':0}, config={'target_column':'label','output_report':True}\),
    ],
    edges=[
        PipelineEdge\(id='e1', source='n1', sourceHandle='df', target='n2', targetHandle='df_in'\),
        PipelineEdge\(id='e2', source='n2', sourceHandle='df', target='n3', targetHandle='df_in'\),
        PipelineEdge\(id='e3', source='n3', sourceHandle='df_train', target='n4', targetHandle='df_train'\),
        PipelineEdge\(id='e4', source='n3', sourceHandle='df_test', target='n5', targetHandle='df_test'\),
        PipelineEdge\(id='e5', source='n4', sourceHandle='model', target='n5', targetHandle='model'\),
    ],
    createdAt='2026-01-01T00:00:00Z',
    updatedAt='2026-01-01T00:00:00Z',
\)
result = generate\(dag, 'python'\)
print\(result.code\)
print\('--- Packages:', result.requiredPackages\)
print\('--- Warnings:', result.warnings\)
" 2>&1)
